title: Petco Health and Wellness Company, Inc. (WOOF) Stock Forecast 2026, 2030 & 7-Year Price Prediction
text: Petco Stock Forecast 2026-2033. Short-term Outlook: Meyka AI predictions suggest the short-term outlook is bearish, with the 1-month projection suggesting a move toward $3.30. Current Price Reference: Stock trades around $2.77 levels. 2026 Price Forecast: Meyka AI forecasts the 2026 price at $3.06, representing -19.99% change from current levels, suggesting near-term consolidation or modest upside. 2030 Forecast: The 2030 forecast suggests $4.29, representing 12.22% long-term upside from 2026 levels. Recovery Narrative: Over a longer period, the forecast suggests recovery as the company executes on its turnaround plan and services grow. Forecast Methodology: These forecasts use machine learning models trained on historical price patterns and fundamental data. Risks to Forecast: Consumer spending trends, competitive dynamics, execution on transformation initiatives, and macro retail environment all pose risks to these price projections.
